nodes.name: AGENTS.md
nodes.summary: Web-app-scoped agent rules warning that this Next.js version has breaking changes and directing agents to read the bundled Next.js docs before writing code.

nodes.name: CLAUDE.md
nodes.summary: Thin Claude-specific entry point for the web app that simply imports the shared AGENTS.md rules so guidance lives in a single source.

nodes.name: README.md
nodes.summary: Overview of the EdPath Next.js front end covering its role as a CopilotKit CoAgent mirror of LangGraph state, a folder map, and the high-level upload-to-summary lesson flow.

nodes.name: components.json
nodes.summary: shadcn/ui configuration selecting the radix-nova style with RSC/TSX, Tailwind CSS variables, the lucide icon set, and import aliases for components, ui, lib, and hooks.

nodes.name: package.json
nodes.summary: Package manifest for the edpath-web Next.js app declaring dev/build/test scripts and dependencies including Next 16, React 19, CopilotKit, Radix UI, Tailwind, and workspace packages @repo/schemas, @repo/tokens, and @repo/types.
nodes.languageNotes: Uses workspace protocol ("*") to consume internal monorepo packages @repo/schemas, @repo/tokens, and @repo/types.

nodes.name: tsconfig.json
nodes.summary: TypeScript compiler configuration for the web app enabling strict mode, bundler module resolution, the Next.js plugin, and the @/* path alias mapped to the app root.
